hero_subtitle: SFTY connects originator and beneficiary Travel Rule data with case management and audit evidence to help compliance teams detect and resolve missing or inconsistent information efficiently.

problem_title: Travel Rule data gaps slow compliance review
problem_description: Incomplete or inconsistent originator and beneficiary data disrupts Travel Rule workflows for VASPs. This creates delays in transaction processing and complicates audit evidence collection for regulatory review.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY links originator and beneficiary data, message status, exceptions and wallet records into structured cases that compliance teams can review with full audit evidence and clear operational context.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule exceptions to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY captures incomplete or inconsistent originator and beneficiary data from Travel Rule messages then routes exceptions into cases with structured evidence for compliance review.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond message gaps. Travel Rule evidence
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects originator and beneficiary data with provider outputs, routing status, cases and audit evidence to create one structured Travel Rule compliance workflow.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing originator and beneficiary data gaps with controlled workflows, audit-ready evidence and enterprise deployment for stronger operational and bank due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how Travel Rule workflows handle missing data cases
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence supports originator and beneficiary reviews

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Travel Rule compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance layer that connects Travel Rule messages, data, exceptions, cases and audit evidence into one operational workflow for regulated digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle originator and beneficiary data?
faq_2_answer: SFTY detects gaps or inconsistencies in originator and beneficiary data, routes flagged cases for review, and supports exception handling within integrated Travel Rule workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, message status updates and case evidence to support audit readiness and defendable compliance review of Travel Rule events.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with multiple Travel Rule providers, consolidating their outputs without replacing them, and applies internal policies to structure workflows and case management.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule providers entirely?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace Travel Rule providers but works above them to connect data, monitor exceptions, and provide structured compliance workflows and reporting.
final_title: Connect originator and beneficiary data gaps
final_description: Review how SFTY maps Travel Rule messages, exceptions and cases into audit-ready workflows for consistent data validation.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
